text: A picture of a giraffe fenced in captivity.
People standing around a birthday cake that says happy birthday Julia.
A bathroom with a sink, mirror, and shower stall.
The skier twists through the air while jumping a series of snow ramps.
three zebras are eating grass outside in the sun,
Woman riding atop an elephant while many other elephants follow nearby in parade at night.
Five lambs standing in a field with mountains in the background.
A man flying a kite in the wind.
Someone is making smaller pizzas to be cooked.
A horse that is standing in the grass.
